name: Aegis Requiem
description:
Yes, i DO know what you all (all the people who care about things I'm doing here... Or just a bunch of random people, i dunno) may say, about my "last" bot I'll make or what I'm probably won't make a new bot, however... I get some motivation after all those videos about big ass robots on YouTube, including Jaegers from Pacific Rim, Mecha Robots and other things, besides, before you say something like "emm, actually, your big ass Mech doesn't being very original" or "bruh, that piece of metal won't be able to defeat any Kaiju from Monsterverse/Pacific Rim" or something like that, I'll just say ONE, just a SINGLE thing... Just let me cook, i KNOW what I'm doing and I'm going this for giggles and shit, plus, i don't like any of that Powerscaling kind of things or Powerscalers at all, like, it's NOT fun to complain about powers of FICTIONAL characters or even putting them in the battle against each other, like, people like them just seems like doesn't understand that power of one character can don't working in the universe of other characters, plus, by using their logic i can say that someone like Shigekiyo Yangu from JOJO can solo around of (how they like to put) 90% of the fiction just because only stand user can see stands or what only stand can hurt other stand (yes, i saw and read Diamond Is Unbreakable and i know what happened with that back-rider), but anyway, let's don't be a bunch of (sorry for my words) nerds and just have fun by using bots instead of arguing about options of other people.

Ps. That image was generated by AI, the same as for my last bot, just other, something like "beautiful people" type and yes, the image doesn't showing everything.
creator: Mister_X
